title: Refactoring CLI Hardening: batch moves, import cleanup, diagnostics
description: Address friction discovered during BLEN-12 file split. move-symbol requires sequential execution (28 calls, ~2 min), rope leaves fully-qualified references instead of clean imports, transient parse errors need auto-retry, and post-move validation is missing. Add a batch split-file command, a fix-imports command, decorator pretty-printing in list-symbols, and automatic post-move syntax/import checks.
definition-of-done: 1. move-symbol auto-retries once on transient rope parse errors. 2. move-symbol runs a post-move syntax check on source and dest. 3. move-symbol cleans up .ropeproject on completion. 4. list-symbols shows decorators as unparsed strings (e.g. @procedural_operator) instead of raw AST dump. 5. New command: fix-imports rewrites fully-qualified module.path.symbol references into from-imports. 6. New command: split-file accepts a source and a symbol-to-dest mapping, executes batch moves, then runs fix-imports on all affected files. 7. list-symbols --deps flag shows which same-file symbols each function calls.
testing-plan: 1. Run move-symbol on a test file and verify .ropeproject is cleaned up. 2. Introduce a transient rope error and verify auto-retry succeeds. 3. Run list-symbols and verify decorators render as @name. 4. Create a file with fully-qualified references, run fix-imports, verify clean from-imports. 5. Run split-file with a 3-symbol plan and verify all symbols moved and imports cleaned.
todos: TODO : Add auto-retry (1 attempt) on rope parse errors in move-symbol
TODO : Add post-move syntax check (ast.parse both source and dest) in move-symbol
TODO : Clean up .ropeproject directory in move-symbol finally block
TODO : Pretty-print decorators in list-symbols (ast.unparse instead of ast.dump)
TODO : New command: fix-imports — rewrite fully-qualified refs to from-imports (AST-based, client-only)
TODO : New command: split-file — batch move with symbol-to-dest mapping + fix-imports pass
TODO : Add --deps flag to list-symbols showing intra-file call dependencies
TODO : move-symbol should report reference update details (what changed in each file)
unknowns: Should split-file accept a JSON file or inline JSON for the plan?
Should fix-imports operate on a single file or a directory?
Is rope's MoveGlobal reliable enough for batch use or should split-file use AST-based moves instead?
